header.title: Buttons group
header.subtitle: Joined collection of buttons that read as a single segmented control. Useful for toolbars, view toggles, and compact pagination.

anatomy.title: Anatomy
anatomy.description: A buttons group is a flex container that visually fuses its children. Outer corners use the system pill radius, inner corners are flat, and shared borders are deduplicated.

parts.container: Wrapping element with role="group" or role="toolbar" and an aria-label.
parts.buttons: Two or more Button children. Each declares its own variant and size.

horizontal.title: Horizontal
horizontal.description: Default orientation. Outer corners adopt the pill radius; inner edges are flat.

vertical.title: Vertical
vertical.description: Stacked variant. Vertical groups switch to --radius-md on the outer corners — pill geometry reads awkwardly on tall stacks.

mixed.title: Mixed variants
mixed.description: Children can mix variants freely. Pair a default button with ghost siblings to express the active selection in a segmented control.

icons.title: With icons
icons.description: Combine iconOnly buttons for compact toolbars. Each button still declares its own aria-label.

toolbar.title: As a toolbar
toolbar.description: Pass role="toolbar" when the group represents a set of editing actions. Pair with aria-label so screen readers can announce the toolbar's purpose.

props.role: ARIA role. Use 'toolbar' for editing toolbars; default 'group' is fine for general selectors.
props.ariaLabel: Recommended. Describes the group's purpose to assistive technology.
props.className: Optional class merged with the base group classes.

localization.title: Localization
localization.description: ButtonsGroup itself has no visible text. Translate the labels of the Button children via useTranslations.
